excerpt: Dependency vulnerability monitoring, Maven Artifact plugin buildinfo work, Surefire and 3.10.0 prep, first atr-maven-plugin release, and Getting Started docs

items.text: Improve dependency vulnerability monitoring for the Apache Maven project family
Analyze Maven Artifact plugin to make improvements for buildinfo generation and build comparison
Remove deprecated deployment feature for buildinfo files from Maven Artifact plugin
Fixing issues of new Surefire mode using JUnit Platform only
Preparing release 3.10.0
Preparing for upgrade of Release Drafter from 6.x to 7.x
Working on atr-maven-plugin to support the release process with ATR (Apache Trusted Releases) service; first release of the plugin
Migration of JUnit 3 based tests that use AbstractMojoTestCase to JUnit 5 in Maven Changelog plugin
Authoring Getting Started documentation
Starting a writing guide for documentation in general

excerpt: Progress on Maven 3.10.0 release train, CycloneDX and buildinfo improvements, ATR release tooling, and Getting Started documentation

items.text: Improve buildinfo-file handling for multimodule projects
Improve on CycloneDX 1.7 ECMA specification implementation for Java
Release train for 3.10.0 has been started with backporting features from 4.x branch
Testing and fixing of the 3.10.0 release train
Check and fix ASF maintained Maven plugins with 3.10.0
Release Maven 3.9.16 with bug fixes
Tool to automate the local release process for Apache Maven
Working on atr-maven-plugin to support the release process with ATR (Apache Trusted Releases) service
Draw up suggestion for "Getting Started" content
Draw up conception for learning paths
Getting Started docs content initialized
Extensive reviews of first two "Getting Started" PRs
Discussion about global writing styles, e.g. addressing the reader in a formal or informal way

excerpt: Major progress on supply chain security with CycloneDX 1.7 validation, Maven 3.10.0 release preparation, and JUnit 5 migration.

Better reproducible builds, detect version range usage in Maven Artifact Plugin
Prepare for Maven 3.10.0 Release

items.text: Surefire JUnit Platform PR merged — unified testing provider now available

excerpt: Starting 'Getting Started' Documentation, Finalising migration Maven Surefire Plugin to JUnit Platform, Announce Initializer for Apache Maven

items.text: Helping add support for GitHub Ruleset into PyGitHub. It is a base library used to enforce branch protection rules in Apache projects
Make progress in migration of JUnit3 based tests JUnit 5
Finalising Refactoring of surefire plugin to use only the Junit Platform to run tests for junit3,4,5,6 and TestNG.
Start creating Architecture Documentation and Blog Posts about Java Module support in Maven 4
Kick off Meeting for 'Getting started' documentation
Announce the first release of Initializer for Apache Maven
